title: An Act to Designate School Sports Participation and Facilities by Sex
last_house_action: 4/29/2026 - The Bill was in the possession of the Committee on Judiciary when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was placed in the Legislative Files. ( DEAD )
last_senate_action: 3/19/2026 - On motion by Senator CARNEY of Cumberland REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY and ordered printed, in concurrence.

actions.description: Transmitted to the Clerk of the 132nd Maine Legislature by the Secretary of State on March 18, 2026 and ordered printed. On motion of Representative Kuhn of Falmouth, the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator CARNEY of Cumberland REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY and ordered printed, in concurrence.
The Bill was in the possession of the Committee on Judiciary when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was placed in the Legislative Files. ( DEAD )
